subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This servant hath awakened from the slumber of heedlessness and hath arisen from the sleep of oblivion, and is now conscious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد تیقظ من رقد الغفلة و انتبه من نوم الذهول و افاق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Shrines and Holy places
